condensed_outline.title: DL-only coarse localization
condensed_outline.summary: Each UE solves a precision-weighted GN problem using its own satellite downlink measurements with clock states fixed to zero.

condensed_outline.title: Joint spatial LM over positions/clocks
condensed_outline.summary: Use spatial cooperation and weighted LM over the gauged theta vector.

condensed_outline.title: Dynamic soft-information refinement
condensed_outline.summary: Fuse SCI dynamics prediction and SFI measurement likelihood through a Gaussian linearized information update.

condensed_outline.title: Implementation-specific C7 caveats
condensed_outline.summary: Only if C7 is chosen as final: residual-scaled covariance, clock-drift state, non-truth safeguard, and single-UE fallback semantics.
condensed_outline.recommended_length: one compact paragraph or appendix/numerical-method note

safe_wording: The first stage provides a DL-only initialization. Each UE solves a precision-weighted GN problem using its own satellite downlink measurements, with clock states fixed to zero, and the resulting positions initialize the cooperative estimator.
In the numerical implementation, LM candidate steps are accepted using observable residual-cost and trust-region checks, not truth-state error.
The final stage recursively fuses soft context information from the dynamic state model with soft feature information from the DL/SL measurements.
For the C7 candidate implementation used in the code-provenance path, the refinement state augments the gauged position/clock vector with non-reference clock-drift components.
A non-truth safeguard reverts weakly observable clock/drift updates, including single-UE clock updates, while preserving position updates.
unsafe_wording: Current C7 figures validate final refined-JCLS results.
Generic EKF/MAP refinement was used for all reported figures unless the final code path confirms this.
Clock drift is estimated by the static offset-only numerical model.
Full block covariance or cross-covariance for C7.
must_fix_before_submission: Choose final Step 3 implementation for figures and align numerical specialization text.
If C7 is final, mention clock drift, residual-scaled covariance, diagonal clipping, and safeguards.
If identity-state SCI/SFI is final, do not cite C7 candidate behavior as manuscript evidence.
Define synchronization error relative to the reference satellite and excluding reference clock.
should_fix_if_time: Shorten soft-information prose before x/Pi/F/Q/P equations.
Replace broad EM/Viterbi/Kalman discussion with one compatibility sentence.
Mention internal range-equivalent clock units only if implementation details are discussed.
nice_to_have: Add compact numerical-method paragraph after equations.
Keep C7 provenance labels out of main manuscript unless needed for auditability.
Leave commented Jacobian appendix inactive unless fully checked.
recommended_next_action: Hold manuscript edits until a human chooses generic identity-state SCI/SFI or C7 as the final algorithm path, then produce a surgical edit plan.
